text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Chorizo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oops, I got ahead of myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, did you hear about the new menu item at
the fast food stand?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's called the Ultra Hot & Loaded Chorizo Burger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's full of super spicy chorizo! I have to eat one!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just know it's gonna be awesome!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go try it together!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Is that Hishiama over there?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey El.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I see... So you two're here to try out the new
burger?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! When I heard how spicy it was, I
couldn't resist!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I thought the burger wasn't half bad, but
it wasn't really that spicy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'd say the spice level was pretty average,
actually, so I doubt it'll meet your expectations.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! That sucks...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But! Hehehe... I know exactly what to do!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I brought my special hot sauce with me just in
case something like this happened!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A red hot bottle of salsa roja made with tons of
chiles!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Sounds interesting. I'd like to try some too, if
ya don't mind.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Trainer? My signature salsa roja
will light a fire in you!
choice_data_list: It's got a very powerful ring to it.
It's got a very powerful ring to it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Trainer? My signature salsa roja
will light a fire in you!
choice_data_list: It's got a very powerful ring to it.
It's got a very powerful ring to it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That it is! It'll send sweat streaming down your
brow while your tongue screams in agony!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's that strong? On second thought...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It'll hike up your metabolism. Add that to the
nutrients from the chorizo, and you've got a
recipe for a huge stamina boost!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can't bring this stuff into the restaurant,
so let's go eat in the park! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's start with the hot sauce! This is my
own signature stuff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gyah! J-just the smell is making my eyes water!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, don't be shy! Open up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Agh! AHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Look how excited she is at all that flavor!
Here, Trainer! Have some too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An indescribable pain travels like a spark of
lightning from my mouth through the rest of my
body! Th-this is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You two all right? You surprised me when ya
started shakin' outta nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who's surprised... Ugh, my whole mouth is killing me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a drink to relieve some of the pain. After
that, I eat my Ultra Hot Chorizo Burger, which
ends up tasting strangely sweet in comparison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa lathers her burger up with her
signature sauce and seems to enjoy the
spiciness...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Salsa means "sauce," and roja means "red!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Red is the color of passion! And passion means
power!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
One taste and you'll be fired up and bright red!
That's roja for ya!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's that strong? On second thought...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course, it's spicy and flavorful!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can't bring this stuff into the restaurant,
so let's go eat in the park! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's start with the hot sauce! This is my
own signature stuff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gyah! J-just the smell is making my eyes water!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, don't be shy! Open up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Agh! AHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Look how excited she is at all that flavor!
Here, Trainer! Have some too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An indescribable pain travels like a spark of
lightning from my mouth through the rest of my
body! Th-this is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You two all right? You surprised me when ya
started shakin' outta nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who's surprised... Ugh, my whole mouth is killing me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a cool drink to relieve some of the pain.
After that, I eat my Ultra Hot Chorizo Burger,
which ends up tasting strangely sweet in
comparison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa lathers her burger up with her
signature sauce and seems to enjoy the
spiciness...
